portabilityClasses.document: Document as a cross-harness reference or native-harness concept; do not port as an executable command yet.
portabilityClasses.skill: Portable as shared harness instructions or agent workflow guidance without needing live OMP TUI control.
portabilityClasses.cli-wrapper: Portable through a stable top-level OMP CLI invocation with explicit arguments and no active TUI dependency.
portabilityClasses.adapter-required: Requires a runtime control adapter because the command reads or mutates the active OMP session, TUI state, transcript, provider stream, or collaboration state.
portabilityClasses.omp-only: Keep as an OMP-only interaction because the command is a TUI affordance or local OMP UI action with no useful Codex/Claude target.

targetSurfaceLegend.codex: Recommended Codex surface after this matrix is accepted.
targetSurfaceLegend.claude: Recommended Claude surface after this matrix is accepted.

commands.name: advisor
commands.codexTarget: adapter command
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command
commands.rationale: Toggles or inspects the live advisor runtime for the active session; a SKILL.md file cannot attach to that OMP advisor loop.

commands.name: agents
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper for bundled agent export
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper for bundled agent export
commands.rationale: The slash command opens the OMP dashboard, but bundled agent export has a stable CLI path suitable for controlled wrappers.

commands.name: branch
commands.codexTarget: adapter command or native thread branch action
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command or documented manual workflow
commands.rationale: Creates a branch from a selected previous message, so it needs access to OMP's live message tree and selection state.

commands.name: browser
commands.codexTarget: adapter command mapped to browser/session controls
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command where browser controls exist
commands.rationale: Changes browser mode inside the active OMP runtime; static skill instructions cannot change that session flag.

commands.name: btw
commands.codexTarget: shared skill for side-question handling
commands.claudeTarget: shared skill for side-question handling
commands.rationale: The behavior is a prompt pattern for bounded side questions, but a skill port must not claim to create OMP's ephemeral subthread without an adapter.

commands.name: changelog
commands.codexTarget: harness reference docs
commands.claudeTarget: harness reference docs
commands.rationale: Mostly exposes OMP release information; other harnesses should reference their own release notes rather than emulate it.

commands.name: collab
commands.codexTarget: adapter command if live relay support is added
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if live relay support is added
commands.rationale: Starts, stops, or views live sharing for the current session and relay connection.

commands.name: compact
commands.codexTarget: native compaction command or adapter
commands.claudeTarget: native compaction command or adapter
commands.rationale: Mutates the current conversation context; a skill can describe compaction but cannot replace the runtime operation.

commands.name: context
commands.codexTarget: native context meter or adapter command
commands.claudeTarget: native context meter or adapter command
commands.rationale: Reads active session context accounting from the runtime.

commands.name: copy
commands.codexTarget: none
commands.claudeTarget: none
commands.rationale: A clipboard picker over rendered TUI messages is an OMP interface affordance, not a portable harness skill.

commands.name: debug
commands.codexTarget: adapter command for runtime diagnostics
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command for runtime diagnostics
commands.rationale: Opens live debug selectors and can dump the next request, which depends on runtime internals.

commands.name: drop
commands.codexTarget: native thread delete/new action or adapter
commands.claudeTarget: documented manual action or adapter
commands.rationale: Deletes the active OMP session and starts a replacement; this must be mediated by runtime control.

commands.name: dump
commands.codexTarget: adapter transcript export
commands.claudeTarget: adapter transcript export
commands.rationale: Returns the current transcript from live session state.

commands.name: exit
commands.codexTarget: none
commands.claudeTarget: none
commands.rationale: Only exits the OMP application process.

commands.name: export
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper requiring explicit session file
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper requiring explicit session file
commands.rationale: HTML export has a stable CLI when the session file is explicit; exporting the active TUI session still needs runtime selection.

commands.name: extensions
commands.codexTarget: none
commands.claudeTarget: none
commands.rationale: The slash command opens an OMP dashboard over extension runtime state.

commands.name: fast
commands.codexTarget: adapter command mapped to model lane selection
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if model lane control exists
commands.rationale: Toggles fast mode for the active session runtime.

commands.name: force
commands.codexTarget: adapter command for next-turn tool forcing
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if tool forcing is exposed
commands.rationale: Forces the next turn to use a tool; this is runtime scheduling state, not static instructions.

commands.name: fork
commands.codexTarget: native fork thread action or adapter
commands.claudeTarget: documented manual action or adapter
commands.rationale: Forks from a selected prior message in the active session tree.

commands.name: fresh
commands.codexTarget: adapter command if provider stream reset is needed
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if provider stream reset is needed
commands.rationale: Resets live provider stream state while preserving transcript.

commands.name: goal
commands.codexTarget: native goal tool mapping or adapter
commands.claudeTarget: skill plus adapter if persistent runtime goals are required
commands.rationale: Maintains persistent autonomous goal state inside the active OMP session.

commands.name: guided-goal
commands.codexTarget: shared skill for goal interview
commands.claudeTarget: shared skill for goal interview
commands.rationale: The interview pattern can be shared as skill guidance, but the skill does not enable OMP goal mode after the interview.

commands.name: handoff
commands.codexTarget: shared handoff skill
commands.claudeTarget: shared handoff skill
commands.rationale: Handoff writing is portable as instructions, but auto-spawning a new OMP session with live context is not part of the skill port.

commands.name: hotkeys
commands.codexTarget: none
commands.claudeTarget: none
commands.rationale: Lists OMP keyboard shortcuts for the current TUI.

commands.name: jobs
commands.codexTarget: adapter command or native job list
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if background jobs are exposed
commands.rationale: Reads live OMP background job state.

commands.name: join
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper when joining OMP relay sessions is desired
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper when joining OMP relay sessions is desired
commands.rationale: Joining a relay is exposed as a stable top-level CLI command, though the joined session remains OMP-owned.

commands.name: leave
commands.codexTarget: adapter command if collaboration relay support is added
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if collaboration relay support is added
commands.rationale: Leaves the active collaboration session.

commands.name: login
commands.codexTarget: adapter command or native provider auth flow
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command or native provider auth flow
commands.rationale: Runs provider OAuth flows against OMP auth/runtime state and may handle redirect URLs.

commands.name: logout
commands.codexTarget: adapter command or native provider auth flow
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command or native provider auth flow
commands.rationale: Mutates OMP provider auth state for the selected provider.

commands.name: loop
commands.codexTarget: adapter command if repeated-turn runtime is added
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if repeated-turn runtime is added
commands.rationale: Resubmits future prompts after yields, which is active runtime scheduling.

commands.name: marketplace
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper for OMP plugin marketplace actions
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper for OMP plugin marketplace actions
commands.rationale: Marketplace operations map to the stable `omp plugin` CLI with explicit action and target arguments.

commands.name: mcp
commands.codexTarget: adapter command or native MCP configuration surface
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command or native MCP configuration surface
commands.rationale: The indexed slash command is an in-session MCP handler, including resources, prompts, notifications, reloads, and reauth; no stable top-level `omp mcp` CLI is present in the checked OMP version.

commands.name: memory
commands.codexTarget: adapter command or native memory surface
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command or native memory surface
commands.rationale: Manages OMP memory stores and queues through slash handlers; a skill cannot safely read or mutate those stores.

commands.name: model
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper for model catalog lookup; native picker for switching
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper for model catalog lookup; native picker for switching
commands.rationale: Model catalog inspection is stable CLI-backed, while changing the active model stays native to each harness.

commands.name: move
commands.codexTarget: adapter command if session-file moves are supported
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if session-file moves are supported
commands.rationale: Moves the current OMP session file, which requires live session identity.

commands.name: new
commands.codexTarget: native new thread action or adapter
commands.claudeTarget: documented manual action or adapter
commands.rationale: Starts a new active OMP session.

commands.name: omfg
commands.codexTarget: shared skill for complaint-to-rule drafting
commands.claudeTarget: shared skill for complaint-to-rule drafting
commands.rationale: The complaint-to-rule workflow is portable as a drafting skill, but the skill does not install the resulting rule into OMP.

commands.name: plan
commands.codexTarget: shared planning skill plus native plan mode where available
commands.claudeTarget: shared planning skill
commands.rationale: The plan-before-execute behavior can be shared as instructions, but toggling OMP plan mode is not provided by the skill itself.

commands.name: plan-review
commands.codexTarget: adapter command if plan review state is exposed
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if plan review state is exposed
commands.rationale: Reopens the latest OMP plan review from active runtime state.

commands.name: plugins
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper for OMP plugin list/enable/disable
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper for OMP plugin list/enable/disable
commands.rationale: Plugin management has a stable top-level `omp plugin` CLI surface with machine-readable output for list operations.

commands.name: quit
commands.codexTarget: none
commands.claudeTarget: none
commands.rationale: Only exits the OMP application process.

commands.name: reload-plugins
commands.codexTarget: adapter command if live OMP plugin reload is needed
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if live OMP plugin reload is needed
commands.rationale: Reloads plugin state inside the running OMP process.

commands.name: rename
commands.codexTarget: native thread title command or adapter
commands.claudeTarget: documented manual title action or adapter
commands.rationale: Renames the active session.

commands.name: resume
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper for launching a selected OMP session
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper for launching a selected OMP session
commands.rationale: Launching a specific saved OMP session is stable CLI-backed when the session id or path is explicit.

commands.name: retry
commands.codexTarget: native retry action or adapter
commands.claudeTarget: native retry action or adapter
commands.rationale: Retries the last failed active agent turn.

commands.name: session
commands.codexTarget: native thread/session metadata or adapter
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if session metadata is exposed
commands.rationale: Reads or deletes the current OMP session.

commands.name: settings
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper for OMP config inspection/editing
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper for OMP config inspection/editing
commands.rationale: The slash command opens a TUI menu, but OMP configuration has a stable CLI path for explicit config operations.

commands.name: setup
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper for dependency/provider setup checks
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper for dependency/provider setup checks
commands.ompTarget: provider setup slash command plus setup CLI
commands.rationale: The slash command opens provider setup, while dependency setup/checks are stable CLI-backed.

commands.name: shake
commands.codexTarget: adapter command if context pruning is exposed
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if context pruning is exposed
commands.rationale: Removes heavy content from the active conversation context.

commands.name: share
commands.codexTarget: adapter command if encrypted share support is added
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if encrypted share support is added
commands.rationale: Creates a share link from the active session transcript and configured sharing backend.

commands.name: ssh
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper for OMP SSH config
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper for OMP SSH config
commands.rationale: SSH host configuration is exposed as a stable top-level CLI.

commands.name: stats
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper for stats JSON or dashboard launch
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper for stats JSON or dashboard launch
commands.rationale: Usage stats are available through a stable top-level CLI.

commands.name: switch
commands.codexTarget: native model switcher or adapter
commands.claudeTarget: native model switcher or adapter
commands.rationale: Changes the model for the active OMP session.

commands.name: tan
commands.codexTarget: shared subagent delegation skill
commands.claudeTarget: shared subagent delegation skill
commands.rationale: The tangential background-work protocol can be expressed as delegation guidance, but the skill does not launch OMP's runtime background agent.

commands.name: todo
commands.codexTarget: native todo tool mapping or adapter
commands.claudeTarget: adapter command if todo state is exposed
commands.rationale: Manages OMP todo state through the slash handler; other harnesses should use native todo surfaces unless an adapter maps state.

commands.name: tools
commands.codexTarget: harness capability reference
commands.claudeTarget: harness capability reference
commands.rationale: Available tools are harness-specific; the portable output is a reference table, not a shared command.

commands.name: tree
commands.codexTarget: native thread tree action or adapter
commands.claudeTarget: documented manual action or adapter
commands.rationale: Navigates OMP's active session tree and branch selection.

commands.name: usage
commands.codexTarget: CLI wrapper for provider usage reports
commands.claudeTarget: CLI wrapper for provider usage reports
commands.rationale: Provider usage has a stable top-level CLI with JSON and redaction flags.

openProductDecisions.question: Should Codex and Claude call OMP runtime controls through a single adapter command schema, separate per-command tools, or native host actions when available?
How should a non-OMP harness select the active OMP session for adapter-required commands without accidentally mutating the wrong TUI session?
For commands such as plan, handoff, tan, and guided-goal, should shared skills be authored as exact OMP behavior clones or as harness-native workflow equivalents?
Which CLI wrappers are allowed to mutate user/project OMP config, auth, plugins, or SSH hosts, and which should be read-only until reviewed?
What approval and redaction policy is required before adapter commands can dump, export, share, move, or delete active sessions?
